title: Canzoneri 2013 amputation/prosthesis PPS
citation: Canzoneri, E., Marzolla, M., Amoresano, A., Verni, G., & Serino, A. (2013). Amputation and prosthesis implantation shape body and peripersonal space representations. Scientific Reports, 3, 2844.
notes: Upper-limb amputation/prosthesis PPS profile. The publication confirms use of an auditory-tactile interaction task; this preload captures the dynamic sound/tactile scaffold while patient group, prosthesis-worn state, and tested limb/body-part factors remain metadata.

reference_parameters.prosthesis_factor: prosthesis worn versus not worn, not yet a GUI factor
reference_parameters.response_rule: speeded response to tactile target, ignore sound
implementation_gaps: exact trial count and tactile calibration table from full paper

provenance.source: Open Scientific Reports abstract and article report PPS testing in upper-limb amputees with an audio-tactile interaction task.
Profile uses the Canzoneri-family dynamic sound scaffold pending full-method verification.
